dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a healer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Sema Reedbasin is a healer anchored to Nomdara relay camps, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.
core_identity.public_role: Sema Reedbasin is a healer anchored to Nomdara relay camps, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky,

setting_placement.location_setting: A mobile connective polity organized as a colossal caravan-city on wheels, with trade expeditions, council-of-elders governance, consensus procedure, portable hearings, and negotiated exchange across hard routes.
who_they_secretly_depend_on: Saint-Physician Orel Vaunt (Healer legacy influence carried into current practice.)

public_vs_private.public_face: Caravan medic who can set a bone in motion and still remember every guest-right debt in camp. Sema Reedbasin carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Sema Reedbasin presents as Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a healer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Sema Reedbasin carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Nomdara relay camps workable through the obligations of healer while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan. Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Nomdara relay camps, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of healer visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Nomdara relay camps, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of healer visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Healer, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Nomdara Caravan.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Nomdara relay camps workable through the obligations of healer while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for ordinary life under institutional pressure, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Benign / Supportive. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Sema Reedbasin can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Healer too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a healer still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of healer in and around Nomdara relay camps, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Sema Reedbasin adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Nomdara relay camps learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Sema Reedbasin or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Sema Reedbasin as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Nomdara relay camps: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Sema Reedbasin can propagate upward through Nomdara Caravan if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

relationships.note: Healer legacy influence carried into current practice.

hooks.summary: Getting involved with Sema Reedbasin can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Sema Reedbasin can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara relay camps: the part of Nomdara relay camps where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Healer.
rumor: People say Sema Reedbasin is Caravan medic who can set a bone in motion and still remember every guest-right debt in camp. and rarely acts without a second motive.
